operational_knowledge_units.title: Destination model stores possible parcel destinations from sort messages
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide states that when a sort message is received, the system receives a list of possible destinations for the parcel and attaches that list to the item.
observed_evidence: Slide title: 'Sorter Sweeper Database / Destination Model'
Visible text: 'When we receive a sort message we receive a list of possible destination for the parcel. We attach that to the item.'

relationships.details: Possible destinations received in the sort message are attached to the item.
The destination list originates from the received sort message.

operational_knowledge_units.retrieval_text: Sorter Sweeper Database Destination Model: when a sort message is received, a list of possible parcel destinations is received and attached to the item.

procedure_candidate_attempts.title: No explicit procedure on destination model slide
procedure_candidate_attempts.procedure_visual_summary: Conceptual database-model slide describing how possible destinations from a sort message are attached to an item; no user actions or ordered steps are shown.
warnings: No explicit reusable action sequence is provided.
procedure_candidate_attempts.retrieval_text: Discarded as procedure candidate: slide 101 describes the Destination Model behavior in the Sorter Sweeper Database, stating that possible destinations from a sort message are attached to the item, but it does not provide operator or support steps.
